label: HTTP Push Fronius to MQTT instant
ModBus Electric Panel Eastron
info:
This module is created to read in sequence N Eastron sdm360 modules

in the first node it will loads the ids of the sdm360 modules

name: L1-L2-L3 Voltage Amp Power
info:
This node will read 2 field from the message:

1) 
  ``
  msg.meterName
  ``

it will use this to create a topic as follow
``
const mqtt_topic = "energy/meters/Instant-raw/" + msg.meterName
``

2) 
  ``
  msg.unitId
  ``
  
it will use to contact the Energy meter on that address.


The registry that will be read are:


```

sdmReadout.voltageL1_V = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(0, 4)             // Register 30001 ->   1, to   2 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.voltageL2_V = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(4, 4)             // Register 30003 ->   3, to   4 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.voltageL3_V = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(8, 4)             // Register 30005 ->   5, to   6 - 4bytes
 
sdmReadout.currentL1_A = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(12, 4)            // Register 30007 ->   7, to   8 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.currentL2_A = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(16, 4)            // Register 30009 ->   9, to  10 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.currentL3_A = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(20, 4)            // Register 30011 ->  11, to  12 - 4bytes
 
sdmReadout.powerL1_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(24, 4)              // Register 30013 ->  13, to  14 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.powerL2_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(28, 4)              // Register 30015 ->  15, to  16 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.powerL3_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(32, 4)              // Register 30017 ->  17, to  18 - 4bytes
 
sdmReadout.totalAmps_A = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(96, 4)            // Register 30049 ->  49, to  50 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.totalPower_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(104, 4)          // Register 30053 ->  53, to  54 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.frequency = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(140, 4)             // Register 30071 ->  71, to  73 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.totalImport_kWh = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(144, 4)       // Register 30073 ->  73, to  75 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.totalExport_kWh = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(148, 4)        // Register 30075 ->  75, to  76 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.totalPowerDuringDemand_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(168, 4) // Register 30085 ->  85, to  86 - 4bytes
sdmReadout.maxPowerDuringDemand_W = msg.payload.buffer.readFloatBE(172, 4)   // Register 30087 ->  87, to  88 - 4bytes  
```

the message payload will be prepared as follows:

```
// note:
// The power sum demand calculation is for import – export. --> if positive we are buying in the last 5 minutes otherwise selling
// Total kWh / kVarh equals to Import + export. 
// console.log(sdmReadout)

 msg.payload = { 
    "id": meterId,
    "L1": {
      "voltageV": sdmReadout.voltageL1_V,              
      "powerW": sdmReadout.powerL1_W,                  
      "currentA": sdmReadout.currentL1_A
    },
    "L2": {
      "voltageV": sdmReadout.voltageL2_V,
      "powerW": sdmReadout.powerL2_W,
      "currentA": sdmReadout.currentL2_A
    },
    "L3": {
      "voltageV": sdmReadout.voltageL3_V,
      "powerW": sdmReadout.powerL3_W,
      "currentA": sdmReadout.currentL3_A
    },

    "totalAmpsA": sdmReadout.totalAmps_A,                    
    "totalPowerW": sdmReadout.totalPower_W, 
    "frequency": sdmReadout.frequency,
    "totalImportkWh": sdmReadout.totalImport_kWh,              
    "totalExportkWh": sdmReadout.totalExport_kWh,      
    "totalPowerDuringDemandTimeW": sdmReadout.totalPowerDuringDemand_W,
    "maxPowerDuringDemandTimeW": sdmReadout.maxPowerDuringDemand_W   

  }
```

info:
This block prepared the payload for the modbus module

The block prepare 3 queries to the sdm630

the 3 queries retrieve information for all the adjiacent registry

it prepares 3 messages that are delayes 50ms

the delay is necessary because the waveshare module that translates modbus to tcp force a wait of at least 20ms
between reads
